entry.title: New IDC EDFSA09D0012 awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC. for the amount of $5,000,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (100) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152. 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE EDAR CLAUSE 3452.239-72, DEPARTMENT SECURITY REQUIREMENTS (MAR 2011), AND THE CORRESPONDING CONTRACT POSITIONS AND RISK DESIGNATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (102) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 6/17/2009 TO 6/16/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE LOCAL CLAUSES FSA 39-5, MONTHLY VENDOR EMPLOYEE REPORT (AUG 2017) AND FSA 32-2 INVOICE AND CONTRACT FINANCING REQUESTS SUBMISSION - INVOICE PROCESSING PLATFORM (AUG 2017).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
